intro.text: We help startups and enterprise to establish an emotional connection between their products and happy engaged customers

steps.title: Discover & Strategize
steps.description: We dive into your brand, goals, audience, and market to uncover opportunities and define a clear creative direction.

steps.title: Design & Refine
steps.description: We transform insights into thoughtful design concepts, refining every detail through feedback and collaboration.

steps.title: Deliver & Launch
steps.description: Final assets are prepared and organized for seamless implementation, helping your brand launch with confidence.

testimonials.quote: Candify helped us transform a rough idea into a complete brand identity. The strategy, logo, and visual system gave our business a level of professionalism we were missing.
testimonials.name: Papiya Banerjee

testimonials.quote: The explainer video simplified our product better than any sales presentation ever could. Engagement increased immediately.
testimonials.name: Saurabh Mangrulkar

about.title: Pushing boundaries since 2011
about.bio: Joris van Dijk is a Dutch designer known for his minimalist, expressive digital work. He helps startups and studios create clean interfaces and strong branding. Based in Utrecht, he blends function with emotion — and often spends his free time cycling or exploring generative art.

testimonial.quote: Astrid's minimalist design approach transformed our brand. The simplicity and clarity she brought to our identity made us stand out in a crowded market. Our customers immediately noticed the difference.
testimonial.name: Helena Moreau

items.question: What's the difference between a subscription and a custom project?
items.answer: A subscription gives you ongoing access to design work on a monthly basis. Custom projects are one-time engagements scoped for specific deliverables.

items.question: How fast is the turnaround?
items.answer: Most requests are completed within 48 hours. More complex projects may take 3-5 days depending on scope.

items.question: How many requests can I make?
items.answer: Unlimited! You can add as many requests to your queue as needed. We work through them one at a time to ensure quality.

items.question: What types of design do you handle?
items.answer: We handle brand identity, web design, app design, presentation design, social media assets, and more.

items.question: What tools do you use?
items.answer: We primarily work in Figma for design, with support for Framer, Webflow, and developer handoff workflows.

items.question: Can I pause the subscription?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can pause and resume your subscription at any time without losing your spot.

items.question: Do you offer development too?
items.answer: Yes, we offer front-end development services including React, Next.js, and Webflow builds.

footer.headline: Let's Connect
footer.subtext: Ready to create something exceptional? Reach out to discuss your project, explore possibilities, or simply start a conversation.
